title: CI: bump VMs
body:
Changes:
  - fix from @mtrmac for go-1.22 panic ("alphabet, duplicate symbols")
  - debian is now cgroupsv2 + crun (does not affect skopeo)
  - many other Red Queen fixes

Built in: https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/338

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
Will wait for https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/338 to merge first, just in case
